achievements.title: Master of Horror

achievements.title: Every Nook and Cranny

achievements.title: It's All Your Fault

achievements.title: Item Management

achievements.title: Full House

achievements.title: You Asked For It

achievements.title: The Quick and the Dead
achievements.description: Finish the game with a clear time of under 5:00:00

achievements.title: It Is What It Is

achievements.title: There Will Not Be Blood
